ArtifactError.description: A single structured failure, so an agent can branch without parsing prose.
ArtifactError.title: ArtifactError

RenderedView.description:
One rendered PNG and the camera that produced it.

Echoes the CameraView angles back (see printlab.rendering.mpl) so the JSON
fully documents how the image was framed without needing to reconstruct the
view from the filename.
RenderedView.title: RenderedView

Status.description: Outcome of a stage, or of a single evaluation check.
Status.title: Status

description:
printlab.rendering.render_views() -> render_report.json.

`input_sha256`/`input_path` fingerprint the source STL; they are supplied
by the caller (the pipeline integration), since render_views() operates on
an in-memory trimesh.Trimesh rather than a file path -- see
printlab.rendering.mpl.

focus_center.description: Region-of-interest override, in the part's native coordinate frame: when set (with focus_radius), every view is framed on a fixed cube around this point instead of the full mesh bounds.
focus_center.title: Focus Center

focus_radius.description: Half-width (mm) of the focus_center cube; None means no zoom override was applied.
focus_radius.title: Focus Radius

layout.description: 'separate' writes one PNG per view (each view's own output_path). 'grid' composites all views (up to 4) into a single 2x2 PNG -- every RenderedView in `views` then shares that one output_path.
layout.title: Layout

title: RenderReport
